name: Nut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, vanilla extract, sifted flour, salt, almond extract, and chopped nuts to the butter. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
3. Form the dough into 2-inch long finger-shaped rolls.
4. Squeeze each roll between your palms to give them an irregular shape.
5. Place the shaped rolls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake in a preheated oven set to 325°F for 15-20 minutes.
7. Makes about 3-1/2 dozen cookies.
